setting.type: Urban street and parking lot hangout near housing projects
setting.location: Nighttime Chicago city street with a lit parking lot and dilapidated multi-story apartment buildings around him and the skyline in the background

camera.motion: Smooth tracking shots, low-angle passes, slow push-ins, Dutch angles and a few dynamic handheld moments around him entering the car
camera.transitions: Match cuts, whip pans around the lowrider, and smooth crossfades between close-ups and wide shots

scene.visual_tone: Gritty but glossy, high-contrast night lighting with neon reflections on chrome and paint

appearance.physique: stocky, strong, clearly athletic build with solid arms and shoulders
appearance.hair: messy, purposefully disheveled and nappy with frosted tips and defined texture
appearance.face: confident, slightly mean-mugging expression with occasional smirks, occasionally bemused and in stages of bliss followed by rage
appearance.tattoos: visible tattoos on arms and shoulders, seen clearly when moving and gesturing, libertine text tattoo, smiling face with eyepatch symbol, scary Terry productions tattoo text

wardrobe.overall_style: ratchet street flex with opulent comedic luxury attitude

outfit.top: black tank top with big, clear,  chic-lettering text on the front that reads: 'FUCKING FABULOUS'
outfit.bottom: pastel chino shorts, pristine with luxury designer emblem, tailored and comfortable
outfit.shoes: clean Ferragamo Gancini sneakers with a stealth wealth aesthetic
accessories: thick canary diamond and gold chain

props.primary_prop: gold tech 9 and matte black Uzi prop gun held like a flashy accessory for a rap video, never fired bullets only sparks, treated as a theatrical, over-the-top opulent status symbol
props.secondary: car keys jingling and sometimes pointed toward the lowrider

behavior.overall_vibe: cocky, loud, unapologetically ratchet, moving like the star of the block
actions: leans against the bouncing lowrider with one foot up, holding the gold Uzi prop casually across the chest
points at the text on the tank top and then at the camera with exaggerated attitude
walks in front of the Impala in slow motion, gesturing to the car and to himself
laughs and talks trash toward the camera, using big hand motions and expressive body language
briefly raises the gold Uzi prop in a non-threatening, stylized way as if showing it off, then rests it on his shoulder or hip

extras.description: A few background friends hyping @tortiou5 up, reacting, filming on phones, laughing and moving to an imaginary beat
extras.behavior: energetic, playful, adding to the ratchet vibe but staying visually secondary to the main character

primary_vehicle.description: Slammed 1959 Chevy Impala lowrider with gleaming chrome, wire wheels, whitewall tires, and candy paint that reflects neon lights
behavior: parked at an angle with front end slightly lifted
hydraulics bouncing the car up and down and tilting it, sometimes with the front corner higher than the rest
suspension movement synced loosely to an imaginary beat

shots.description: Wide shot of the parking lot at night, the 1959 Impala lowrider parked at an angle, then its hydraulics begin bouncing.
shots.transition: Whip pan into a closer shot around the front of the car

shots.description: Low-angle shot from near the pavement looking up at @tortiou5 standing in front of the Impala, nappy afro silhouetted against the city lights, tank top text 'FUCKING FABULOUS' clearly visible.
shots.transition: Match cut into a tracking shot along the side of the car

shots.description: Camera tracks along the side of the Impala as it bounces, chrome and paint catching neon reflections, then reveals @tortiou5 leaning on the rear quarter panel holding the gold Uzi prop.
shots.transition: Quick whip pan to a medium-close shot of his upper body

shots.description: @tortiou5 gesturing at his tank top text, talking trash to the camera, flexing his arms and tattoos, gold chain moving as he talks.
shots.transition: Smooth crossfade to a close-up of the gold Uzi prop and jewelry

shots.description: Close-up of the gold Uzi prop, gold chain, and bracelet as he moves his hands and points at the car, everything gleaming under streetlights and neon.
shots.transition: Cut back to wide shot with bouncing lowrider and friends reacting

shots.description: Wide shot of the Impala bouncing while @tortiou5 stands in front, arms spread slightly like he owns the block, friends hyping him up in the background.

lighting_and_color.lighting: Strong streetlights and colored neon accents, rim lighting on the afro and shoulders, reflections on chrome and gold.
lighting_and_color.color_grade: Deep blues and purples in the shadows, warm highlights on skin and metal, giving a high-contrast, stylish music video look.

style_notes.tone: Confident, comedic, ratchet, and luxurious in a loud, street way.
style_notes.focus: Always keep @tortiou5, the tank top text 'FUCKING FABULOUS', the nappy afro, the gold Uzi prop, and the bouncing '59 Impala clearly visible in multiple shots.
